name: ads-mcp
description: One MCP server, five ad platforms (Meta, LinkedIn, Google Ads, GA4, GSC). 89 named tools, OAuth wizard, OS keychain credential storage, auto-refresh, dry-run by default, audit-logged.
long_description:
ads-mcp is a unified Model Context Protocol server exposing Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads, Google Analytics 4, and Google Search Console as 89 typed tools for any AI client.

Key features:
- **Full Meta surface (45 tools)** — campaigns, ad sets, ads, creatives, audiences, lookalikes, lead-gen forms, pixels, custom conversions, 6 insights flavors, targeting search/browse, delivery estimates
- **OAuth wizard** for Meta / LinkedIn / Google with OS-keychain storage and auto-refresh
- **Multi-account** from day one with per-account read/read_write toggle
- **Dry-run by default** on every write — preview before commit
- **Audit log** at ~/.ads-mcp/audit.log records every mutation
- **Doc-page drift detection** flags when Meta or Google update a documented surface

After installing, run `ads-mcp setup --oauth linkedin` (or meta / google) to authorize. Configuration lives at ~/.ads-mcp/config.json.
